title: Thai Stir-Fry with Haddock
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make Thai stir-fry with haddock, perfect for a quick dinner. This dish is packed with protein and can be made in under 30 minutes.

ingredients.name: dence vegetables
ingredients.notes: Mixed bell peppers, carrots, snow peas

instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add haddock fillets and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, until cooked through.
Remove haddock from skillet and set aside.
Add stir sauce to skillet and bring to a simmer.
Add vegetables to skillet and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Return haddock to skillet and stir to coat with sauce.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with Thai basil.
